Welcome to my website!

Hi, I'm storm. AKA Desiree Velasquez!
I'm a student currently majoring in game art. I'm experienced in C, Python, HTML and CSS. I also work on visual novels in my spare time! I specialize in stylized 2D art and animation, but I'm currently learning 3D modeling.

FOR BUISNESS INQUIRIES: desvelasquez19@gmail.com
if you'd like to contact me on discord or otherwise, please let me know through instagram or linkedin.

thank you!
- storm/desiree.
